sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPM) stock dropped 1.27% to $291.66 on Thursday, breaking a three-day winning streak. This decline occurred during a broader market downturn, with the S&P 500 Index falling 1.74% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average decreasing by 1.01%.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Is Up 33% Year to Date. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Enphase Energy has seen its stock rise 33% year-to-date, driven by early signs of stabilization in residential solar markets after a downturn. The company's valuation model suggests a target price of $50, implying a 16% upside over the next 2.8 years, as demand recovers, margins improve, and energy storage adoption increases. Institutional investors are actively positioning themselves, with major firms increasing their stakes, signaling confidence in Enphase's future performance.

feed.title: Newmont files 2025 Annual Report and underscores global investor disclosure
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation, a leading global gold miner with diversified metal outputs, has filed its 2025 Annual Report with the SEC. The company emphasizes its commitment to transparent disclosure for investors across its global exchange listings, including the ASX, NYSE, and PNGX. Newmont, listed in the S&P 500, highlights its strong ESG credentials and aims to create value through sustainable and responsible mining practices.

feed.title: Circular Design Illustrated Through Four Cisco Products
feed.summary: Cisco is committed to circular design, integrating sustainability into products and packaging from the outset to extend product life cycles, reduce waste, and improve energy efficiency. The article highlights four product examples—UCS-X servers, Webex Room Bar, Desk Phone 9800 Series, and Nexus 9332D-H2R Switch—each demonstrating specific circular design principles such as modularity, recycled content, efficient power use, and improved repairability. Cisco aims to apply circular design principles to 100% of new products and packaging in FY26, continuously refining its criteria based on stakeholder feedback.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation brings SecureOT to industrial systems
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation has launched its SecureOT service, designed to protect industrial operational technology (OT) systems from cyber threats. The service leverages Rockwell's deep expertise in industrial automation and addresses the unique challenges of OT security, which prioritizes safety and availability over confidentiality. The article highlights the increasing legislative accountability for OT security in Australia and discusses the critical need for improved visibility, managed remote access, and bridging the communication gap between IT and OT teams to enhance industrial resilience.

feed.title: Stock Market Today, March 26: Netflix Stock Rises After Raising Subscription Prices
feed.summary: Netflix stock rose on March 26 after the company announced price hikes for all its subscription tiers, including its ad-supported, standard, and premium plans. Investors are reacting positively, anticipating increased revenue despite potential customer churn, as Netflix plans to invest more in content, including live sports. Other streaming entertainment stocks like Walt Disney and Warner Bros. Discovery saw declines on the same day.

feed.title: iShares Global Infrastructure ETF (NASDAQ: IGF) - Dividends
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed list of past and future dividend distributions for the iShares Global Infrastructure ETF (NASDAQ: IGF). It includes dividend amounts, ex-dividend dates, and payment dates stretching from 2013 to 2025, alongside the current share price and a 7-day average cash dividend.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) Shares Down 1.1% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) shares experienced a 1.1% decline in mid-day trading to $142.33, with trading volume significantly below average. Despite the dip, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $168.33. The company recently reported quarterly EPS that beat estimates but slightly missed revenue projections, and disclosed a quarterly dividend, though insider selling of shares was noted.

feed.title: Liberty Broadband Stock: Holding Company Structure, Charter Stake and Key Governance Ahead of 2026 Meeting
feed.summary: Liberty Broadband, a significant holding company, primarily owns a stake in Charter Communications, driving its value from broadband and cable service growth. The company is preparing for its 2026 annual meeting on May 11, which will virtually address key governance matters like director elections and auditor ratification. Investors should monitor outcomes regarding strategic direction, especially decisions related to Charter, and consider the underlying fundamentals of the broadband sector.

feed.title: The Vanguard Group (NYSE: CTVA) reports zero beneficial shares in Corteva
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an Amendment No. 6 to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0 beneficial shares and 0% ownership of Corteva Inc. common stock. This change is attributed to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries now report their holdings separately. The filing clarifies that this disaggregation of reporting follows SEC Release No. 34-39538 and does not reflect a change in Corteva's fundamental ownership structure but rather Vanguard's reporting methodology.

feed.title: Vanguard files 13G/A: CoStar Group (CSGP) ownership shown as 0%
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an Amendment No. 13 to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0% beneficial ownership in CoStar Group Inc. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately. This is a procedural announcement clarifying reporting responsibility rather than a trading decision, with future subsidiary filings to detail individual positions.

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: DHR) disaggregates holdings, reports 0 shares for parent
feed.summary: Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G stating it now holds 0 shares of Danaher (DHR) due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This change means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will report their holdings separately, with Vanguard explaining it's an administrative reallocation of reporting responsibilities rather than an economic divestment or sale. Investors should look for subsequent filings from Vanguard affiliates to see where the economic interests are now reported.

feed.title: Verisign EVP Indelicarto sells $124,500 in shares
feed.summary: Thomas C. Indelicarto, Executive Vice President, General Counsel, and Secretary of Verisign (NASDAQ:VRSN), sold 498 shares of company stock for a total of $124,500. This transaction occurred amidst a 5% increase in Verisign's stock price over the past week, although InvestingPro analysis suggests the company might be slightly overvalued. The sale leaves Indelicarto with 39,198.258 shares in the company, which continues to demonstrate strong gross profit margins and trades at a P/E ratio of 28.4.

feed.title: Target faces a new boycott over ICE response as retailer presses ahead with turnaround
feed.summary: A major labor union, the American Federation of Teachers (AFT), is calling for its 1.8 million members to boycott Target and shop at local stores. This boycott stems from the AFT's belief that Target did not adequately respond to a surge of federal immigration enforcement in Minneapolis, which included the fatal shooting of two U.S. citizens. This new boycott adds to Target's challenges as it attempts a turnaround, despite a previous boycott related to diversity, equity, and inclusion initiatives recently ending.

feed.title: Walton Family Holdings Trust trims Walmart (WMT) stake with 3.28M-share open-market sale
feed.summary: The Walton Family Holdings Trust has reduced its stake in Walmart (WMT) through open-market sales of 3.279 million common shares in late March. These transactions occurred at weighted average prices between $122 and $123 per share. Despite these sales, the trust still retains a significant holding of 513,524,456 Walmart common shares, indicating a routine trimming rather than a complete exit.

feed.title: Inhibikase Therapeutics Inc reports results for the quarter ended December 31 - Earnings Summary
feed.summary: Inhibikase Therapeutics Inc has reported its earnings summary for the quarter ended December 31. The report is a brief overview of the company's financial results for that period.

feed.title: Is Teledyne’s Offshore and Space Hardware Push Reshaping The Investment Case For Teledyne Technologies (TDY)?
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies is reinforcing its position in mission-critical markets by expanding its offshore energy and space communications hardware offerings. Recent achievements include an award for its eXtreamer seismic streamer and the full production launch of its 16GB DDR4-X1 memory for space electronics. These developments support Teledyne's long-term growth catalysts in defense, marine, and space, though investors should also consider potential integration risks impacting margins.

feed.title: Does Western Gateway’s Extended Open Season Reshape the Midstream Cash Flow Story for Phillips 66 (PSX)?
feed.summary: Kinder Morgan and Phillips 66 extended the open season for the Western Gateway refined products pipeline, aiming to secure long-term pipeline commitments to stabilize Phillips 66's midstream cash flows. While this supports the company's efforts to smooth out earnings beyond refining, refining margins and execution on turnarounds remain key near-term factors. Investors are awaiting the Q1 earnings webcast on April 29, 2026, for more details on how this project fits into Phillips 66's strategy for stable cash flow.

feed.title: Ross Stores Insider Sold Shares Worth $1,489,285, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at Ross Stores recently sold shares valued at $1,489,285, as disclosed in a recent SEC filing. The article highlights this transaction alongside other news and analyst ratings concerning Ross Stores, Inc. The company, an apparel and accessories retailer, also announced the opening of 17 new stores in February and March.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; parent reports 0 shares of Chevron (CVX)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amendment to its Schedule 13G, reporting zero beneficial ownership of Chevron Corp common stock. This change follows an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately. This administrative amendment indicates that the parent entity no longer directly holds Chevron shares, and future subsidiary filings will show where the actual positions reside.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates CTAS holdings; subsidiaries to report separately (CTAS)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has reported zero beneficial ownership of Cintas Corp (CTAS) Common Stock following an internal realignment. This change is due to certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions now reporting their beneficial ownership separately, in reliance on SEC Release No. 34-39538, effective January 12, 2026. This is a procedural re-allocation of reporting responsibility, not a market trade, and investors should look for future filings from individual Vanguard subsidiaries for actual ownership figures.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] COCA COLA CO Amended Passive Investment Disclosure
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G for Coca-Cola Co. (KO), reporting zero shares beneficially owned. This change occurred due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions will now report ownership separately. The filing confirms 0% beneficial ownership by The Vanguard Group and is signed by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration.

feed.title: Vanguard realigns holdings; Charles River (NYSE: CRL) shows 0% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard has reported a 0% beneficial ownership stake in Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE: CRL) following an internal realignment that took effect on January 12, 2026. This change means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately, in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538, and Vanguard itself no longer claims beneficial ownership over those securities. The filing emphasizes that this is a change in reporting structure rather than an actual divestment, and future filings by the subsidiaries may reveal their individual holdings in Charles River.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] CF Industries Holdings, Inc. Amended Passive Investment Disclosure
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for CF Industries Holdings Inc., reporting zero beneficial ownership of common stock. This change follows an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately. Vanguard disclaims beneficial ownership of these subsidiary holdings, a move supported by SEC Release No. 34-39538.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; reports 0 shares in CenterPoint Energy (CNP)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amendment (SCHEDULE 13G/A) stating that it now beneficially owns 0 shares of CenterPoint Energy common stock, representing 0% of the class. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will report their holdings separately. The filing clarifies that this is a reallocation of reporting and not a market trade of CNP shares.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; reports 0 CINF shares (NYSE: CINF)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0 shares and 0% beneficial ownership in Cincinnati Financial Corp (CINF). This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, in which certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their beneficial ownership separately in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing indicates that The Vanguard Group no longer has beneficial ownership over securities held by these disaggregated entities, with subsequent filings from those subsidiaries expected to reflect their holdings.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; CMS (NYSE: CMS) parent reports 0 shares
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an Amendment No. 17 to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting that it now beneficially owns 0 shares of CMS Energy Corp. This change follows an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions will report beneficial ownership separately, as per SEC Release No. 34-39538. This means The Vanguard Group, Inc. no longer claims beneficial ownership over securities held by these disaggregated entities.

feed.title: Vanguard realignment leads to separate reporting; CHRW shows 0 shares (Vanguard)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for CH Robinson Worldwide Inc (CHRW), indicating that it now holds 0 shares. This change reflects an internal realignment within Vanguard effective January 12, 2026, where certain subsidiaries or business divisions will begin reporting their beneficial ownership separately in reliance on SEC Release No. 34-39538. Previously aggregated holdings will now be disaggregated, meaning specific Vanguard entities will disclose their positions individually rather than under the main Vanguard Group entity.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; Citizens Financial (CFG) parent reports 0
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Citizens Financial Group Inc. (CFG), reporting 0 shares beneficially owned. This change follows an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions will now report beneficial ownership separately, in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing indicates a reallocation of reporting responsibility rather than an economic change in investor interest for CFG.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land (NYSE: TPL) investor reports 10.05M-share, 14.6% stake
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC has reported a beneficial ownership of 10,050,070 shares, or 14.6%, of Texas Pacific Land Corp (NYSE: TPL) common stock. This stake, based on 68,941,554 shares outstanding as of February 9, 2026, grants Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC sole voting and dispositive power. Murray Stahl, CEO and CIO of Horizon Kinetics Asset Management and a director of Texas Pacific Land, also holds direct and indirect interests in additional TPL shares.

feed.title: Vanguard entities disaggregate holdings after Jan 12, 2026 realignment (COHR)
feed.summary: Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Coherent Corp (COHR), reporting 0 shares beneficially owned due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026. This administrative change means that various Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately. The filing clarifies that this disaggregation does not signal a sale of COHR shares but rather a change in reporting structure.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; CPT shows 0 shares (Vanguard)
feed.summary: Vanguard has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0 shares of Camden Property Trust (CPT) due to an internal realignment. This means The Vanguard Group no longer has beneficial ownership over securities held by certain subsidiaries, which will now report their holdings separately. Investors seeking current institutional positions in CPT should look for these disaggregated filings from Vanguard's affiliates.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates Colgate-Palmolive holdings (NYSE: CL)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0 shares of Colgate-Palmolive common stock following an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This change reflects a disaggregation of holdings, where certain subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately, as permitted by SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing explicitly notes this is a reporting allocation change, not an economic transaction involving the sale or purchase of shares.

feed.title: Century Therapeutics (IPSC) files $150M ATM shelf with TD Cowen
feed.summary: Century Therapeutics (IPSC) has filed a prospectus supplement to register an "at-the-market" (ATM) shelf offering of up to $150 million in common stock through TD Cowen. Approximately $131.6 million remains available under this offering, with sales to be made at market prices and TD Cowen receiving a 3.0% commission. The net proceeds are intended for general corporate purposes, including research, clinical development, manufacturing, working capital, and capital expenditures.

feed.title: Verisign (VRSN) EVP sells 498 shares at $250 in open market
feed.summary: Verisign executive Thomas C. Indelicarto, EVP, General Counsel & Secretary, reported an open-market sale of 498 shares of Verisign common stock at $250.00 per share on March 25, 2026. This transaction was disclosed in a Form 4 filing and indicates a "moderate impact" and "negative sentiment." Following the sale, Indelicarto directly holds 39,198.258 Verisign shares, showing the sale was a relatively small portion of his total holdings.

feed.title: Vanguard Group (SCHW) Amendment: Reports 0 Shares After Internal Realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amendment (Schedule 13G/A) for Charles Schwab Corp. (SCHW) reporting 0 shares beneficially owned, representing 0% of common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, which disaggregated certain subsidiaries' holdings for separate reporting, in accordance with SEC guidance. The filing clarifies that while Vanguard itself no longer reports beneficial ownership of these shares, its subsidiaries will now report their positions separately.

feed.title: Phillips 66 Rose 21% in the Last 30 Days. Here’s What’s Driving the Rally and Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Phillips 66 stock has rallied 21% in the last 30 days, driven by improving refining margins due to stronger fuel demand and favorable heavy crude prices. The company's diversified earnings mix, including stable midstream operations, and strong institutional interest are supporting the stock. A valuation model suggests a target price of $197, indicating a 9% upside based on refining margin recovery and consistent cash flow.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Corp. Stock: Steady Leader in Global Elevator and Escalator Markets Amid Institutional Interest
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide Corp. maintains a strong position in the global vertical transportation industry, characterized by recurring service revenues and a significant global presence. The company's business model, heavily reliant on maintenance contracts, provides stability against economic fluctuations. Institutional investors show confidence with recent stake acquisitions, while analysts generally hold a 'Hold' rating with potential upside.

feed.title: Vanguard discloses zero Cencora holdings (NYSE: COR) after internal realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an Amendment No. 20 to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting zero beneficial ownership in Cencora Inc (NYSE: COR) common stock, representing 0% of the class. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, which led certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions to report their holdings separately. The filing clarifies a reporting mechanics disclosure rather than signaling a market action.

feed.title: McCormick files legal opinion for shares offered under Investor Services Plan
feed.summary: McCormick (MKC) has filed a legal opinion confirming the validity of common and non-voting common shares to be offered through its Investor Services Plan. WilmerHale provided the legal opinion for these shares, which are registered on Form S-3. A prospectus supplement for this offering was filed with the SEC on March 26, 2026.

feed.title: Caterpillar releases recast 2025 segment revenues, reports $67.6B total sales for 2025
feed.summary: Caterpillar reported recast unaudited 2025 segment results, revealing total sales and revenues of $67.589 billion. This figure reflects a segment realignment, with Construction Industries contributing $25.060 billion and Power & Energy $28.624 billion. The company stated that prior forward-looking segment assumptions remain largely unchanged, with updated assumptions expected by April 30, 2026.

feed.title: AvalonBay nearly doubles Mountain View housing plans as AI moves into town
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities is significantly expanding its Mountain View housing project, nearly doubling the units at Eaves Mountain View from 402 to 725. This expansion is driven by the surging demand for housing in Silicon Valley, fueled by the influx of tech and AI companies like OpenAI, which recently leased a large campus nearby. The project benefits from state density bonus laws and highlights a trend of developers restarting previously stalled projects to address the region's housing crisis.

feed.title: Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) director awarded deferred and common shares
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker director John L. Garrison Jr. was awarded deferred and common shares on March 24, 2026, as part of his compensation, not through market transactions. He acquired over 529 deferred shares from fee deferrals and dividend equivalents, along with approximately 39 common shares at $70.77 each. These awards increase his direct holdings and will be settled in shares upon the termination of his board service, as per the company's non-employee director deferral plans.

feed.title: [144] ROSS STORES, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This SEC filing is a Form 144 for ROSS STORES, INC. (ROST), indicating a proposed sale of securities. The filing details the securities to be sold, including 4883 common shares acquired as a stock bonus on March 20, 2026, with an aggregate market value of $1,059,122.70. The sale is scheduled for March 26, 2026, on NASDAQ through Merrill Lynch.

feed.title: SVP and CFO Sells 61,000 Laureate Education Shares Worth $2.1 Million
feed.summary: Richard M. Buskirk, SVP & CFO of Laureate Education (NASDAQ:LAUR), sold 61,803 shares worth approximately $2.08 million, representing 20.04% of his direct holdings. This was Buskirk's largest single-day disposition, occurring after exercising options for 2,803 shares. Despite the sale, he retains almost 80% of his direct holdings, and the company continues on a positive growth path with rising revenue and a relatively low valuation at 17 times earnings.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL INC Amended Passive Investment Disclosure
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc., reporting beneficial ownership of 0 shares of common stock, representing 0% of the class. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately. The filing clarifies that Vanguard no longer has or is deemed to have beneficial ownership over securities held by these disaggregated entities.

feed.title: McCormick (NYSE: MKC) files legal opinion for Investor Services Plan
feed.summary: McCormick & Company (NYSE: MKC) has filed an 8-K form detailing a legal opinion from Wilmer Cutler Pickering Hale and Dorr LLP concerning the validity of common stock and non-voting common stock offered under its Investor Services Plan. These shares are registered under an existing Form S-3 shelf, with a related prospectus supplement filed on March 26, 2026. The filing includes the law firm's opinion and consent as exhibits, confirming the legal standing of the shares being offered.

feed.title: SEALSQ to Acquire Swiss Quantum Interconnect Firm Miraex to Complete Vertical Stack
feed.summary: SEALSQ Corp, a leader in post-quantum semiconductor and cybersecurity solutions, has signed a binding Letter of Intent to acquire Miraex SA, a Swiss photonics-based quantum interconnect specialist. This acquisition, expected to close by June 2026, aims to complete SEALSQ’s quantum vertical stack and strengthen its Quantum Spatial Orbital Cloud initiative for secure space-based infrastructure. Despite the strategic acquisition, analyst ratings and Spark’s AI analysis indicate a neutral outlook for LAES stock due to challenging financial performance and unattractive valuation.

feed.title: 5 Popular Penny Stocks on Robinhood to Buy
feed.summary: This article lists the top 5 popular penny stocks on Robinhood. It highlights SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ:LAES) as one of the stocks, detailing its recent Letter of Intent to acquire Miraex SA, a photonics-based quantum interconnect company. The acquisition aims to strengthen SEALSQ's quantum computing capabilities and accelerate its Quantum Spatial Orbital Cloud initiative.

feed.title: KULR Technology Group Sets Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Call for Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 4:30 p.m. ET
feed.summary: KULR Technology Group (NYSE American: KULR) announced it will host a conference call on Tuesday, March 31, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025. Financial results will be released in a press statement before the call. Management will lead the call, followed by a Q&A session, and interested parties can submit questions via email by March 29, 2026.
